curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. Locations derived from the patch diff which modified only rand_core/src/le.rs. The two functions read_u32_into and read_u64_into had their buffer length assertion multipliers on the wrong side (e.g. 4*src.len() >= dst.len() instead of src.len() >= 4*dst.len()), making the checks too permissive and allowing destination buffers to not be fully populated when seeding RNGs. Vulnerability class crypto-weakness confirmed: CWE-330 maps directly to weak RNG seeding. L3 hints now differentiated from L1/L2 with targeted subsystem and mechanism details.
